evals.prompt: Create a new A2A agent called my-a2a using the agent card in evals/files/agent_card.json
evals.expected_output: The skill generates the `gcloud alpha agent-registry services create my-a2a` command with `--agent-spec-type=a2a-agent-card` and uses the file content for `--agent-spec-content`.

evals.prompt: Register a new GitHub MCP server using the spec from evals/files/mcp_spec.json
evals.expected_output: The skill generates the `gcloud alpha agent-registry services create github` command with `--mcp-server-spec-type=tool-spec` and uses the file content for `--mcp-server-spec-content`.
